script_title: The Hidden System That Moves Your Luggage After Check-In
seo_title: What Really Happens to Your Luggage After Check-In?
goal: Create a clear, intriguing visual concept that makes the hidden airport baggage handling system immediately understandable, showing that a suitcase disappears from the passenger-facing terminal into a complex world of conveyors, scanners, routing data, and machinery.
style: Cinematic documentary realism with a polished, high-clarity infrastructure aesthetic; the suitcase should feel tangible and real while the surrounding data overlays feel subtle and technical.
required_thumbnail_scene: suitcase entering conveyor belts behind check-in
visual_must_include: aircraft loading or baggage cart handoff
visual_must_avoid: random suitcase with no system context
